THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEIGER, ROBERT LACTAOEN, JEFFERY SUED AS DOE 1 MENARA, GREG SUED AS DOE 2 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3493 16TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO $2,704.34 RENT, $4,005.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,084.34, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF AWARDED POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AGAINST ALL THREE OF THE DEFTS. PLTF AWARDED PRINCIPAL, ATTY'S FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFT ROBERT NEIGER ONLY. ATTY'S FEES AND COSTS THROUGH A COST BILL.
